title: Bundle Bid — Rigging + OWA
openingLine: We just got the ITB on the Hartford PAC project. It's a bundle bid that includes rigging plus the OWA stuff. Can you handle the OWA piece and tell me what to do about the rigging side?
customerContext: You're an estimator who doesn't deeply know the difference between rigging and OWA product. You see this as one package and you want one quote. You don't realize Wenger's rigging dealer network operates differently from the OWA direct-sale relationship.

hiddenInfo.reveal: $62M performing arts center. Rigging + OWA scope is roughly $1.4M combined.
Acoustic shell, risers, choral risers, and storage carts.
Counterweight rigging system, motorized line sets — needs to go through a Wenger rigging dealer.
We've done one project with you guys before. Went smoothly.
Architect is Bremmer Studio. Owner is Hartford Public Schools.
We don't have a preferred rigging installer. Open to recommendations.

Discovery & Qualification.behavior: Determined which products are OWA vs. rigging dealer scope
Identified due date, scope, and project specifics

Solution Framing.behavior: Collaborated with RPAM, PCE, and TSM on bid strategy

Opportunity Expansion.behavior: Planned TSM follow-up with GC/CM and owner
Planned RPAM follow-up with rigging dealers

Timeline Awareness.behavior: Confirmed bid due date and Go-to-Market plan
Confirmed bid was sent on time

Closing & Next Steps.behavior: Confirmed bid was sent and stakeholders were aligned

Other.behavior: Ensured ITB was sent to RPAM
